WELCOME_SUBTITLE: Angular UI Mods - A comprehensive component library for modern Angular applications
AUTHORIZATION_MESSAGE: By logging in, you authorize the Agent to access your personal and official details (including confidential data) for the purpose of summarizing & generating results.

BROWSER_NAVIGATION_PROTECTION_DESC: When enabled, you will be warned before leaving the page (refresh, back, or forward navigation). Useful for forms with unsaved changes.
UNSAVED_CHANGES_WARNING: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
PANEL_1_CONTENT: This is the content for personal information panel. You can add form fields or any content here.
PANEL_2_CONTENT: This is the content for contact details panel. Add phone, email, address fields here.
PANEL_3_CONTENT: This panel is disabled and cannot be opened.
STEP_1_CONTENT: Complete the initial setup process. Multiple panels can be open at once.
STEP_3_CONTENT: Review all your settings before proceeding.
SLIDE_TOGGLE_DESCRIPTION: Slide toggles are a quick way to toggle a single value on or off.
ABOUT_MESSAGE: Welcome to AUM - Angular UI Mods! This is a comprehensive component library built for modern Angular applications. Browse through our playground to explore all available components, or check the documentation for detailed usage guides. To report issues or submit feedback, visit our GitHub repository.
CORE_FEATURES_SUBTITLE: Discover the powerful capabilities built into AUM
COMPONENT_LIBRARY_DESC:
Pre-built Angular components following Material Design guidelines.
Consistent fonts, colors, spacing across the application.
Buttons, forms, dialogs, charts, and navigation components.
Fully responsive and accessible by default.
APP_SETUP_DESC:
Configure via app-config.json without touching code.
Set brand logo, app name, and navigation items.
Customize toolbar menus and routing structure.
Zero-config setup for new applications.
PERSONALIZATION_DESC:
Multi-language support with ngx-translate (English, Japanese, Hindi).
Light and dark theme switching with Material Design 3.
Three color palettes: Purple, Ocean Blue, and Sea Green.
UI scaling modes: Compact, Default, and Large.
User preferences persist across sessions.
CSP_DESC:
Enterprise-grade CSP configuration included.
Prevents XSS attacks and code injection.
Secure content delivery across all pages.
Nonce-based script and style loading.
GIT_SUBTREE_DESC:
Modular codebase with git subtree management.
Independent versioning for core libraries.
Shared components across multiple apps.
Easy deployment and maintenance.
PLAYGROUND_DESC:
Live demos of all UI components and features.
Interactive examples with code snippets.
Test charts, forms, buttons, and dialogs.
Experiment with themes and UI scaling.
MODERN_ARCHITECTURE_DESC:
Angular standalone components with signals reactivity.
New control flow syntax (@if, @for) for better performance.
HTTP interceptors for auth, logging, and error handling.
Lazy loading and code splitting for optimal bundle size.
PRODUCTION_QUALITY_DESC:
WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility with keyboard navigation.
Screen reader support with proper ARIA labels.
OnPush change detection and performance optimization.
Virtual scrolling and efficient rendering strategies.
RESPONSIVE_DESIGN_DESC:
Centralized SCSS breakpoint mixins — no scattered magic numbers.
ViewportService signal for TypeScript-based conditional rendering.
Breakpoints aligned with Angular Material CDK (600px, 960px).
Pure CSS media queries, zero runtime cost for styling.
WHY_AUM_SUBTITLE: Built to make your team faster, safer, and consistent from day one
BENEFIT_AI_DESC: Structured docs, typed patterns, and explicit conventions — AI tools like Copilot, Cursor, and Claude generate better code when the codebase is well-defined
BENEFIT_VELOCITY_DESC: Pre-wired templates, theming, i18n, and routing. Skip months of setup, ship features from day one
BENEFIT_ENTERPRISE_DESC: NX monorepo, git subtree, CSP, lazy loading, OnPush CD — production-grade from commit one
BENEFIT_SLOP_DESC: Opinionated patterns keep AI-generated code within your established conventions, not drifting into inconsistency
BENEFIT_BRAND_DESC: Centralized theme, palette, typography, and spacing — every app looks like yours, not a generic Material clone
BENEFIT_MODERN_DESC: Angular 21, Material Design 3, Signals, standalone components, TypeScript 5.9 — no legacy NgModules, no zone.js workarounds, zero inherited tech debt
GS_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Everything you need to set up AUM in a new Angular application.
GS_OVERVIEW_DESC: AUM (Angular UI Mods) is a component library and application shell framework built on Angular 21 and Material Design 3. It provides ready-to-use templates, a rich set of UI components, theming infrastructure, and i18n support — so teams can focus on building features instead of boilerplate.
GS_PREREQUISITES_DESC: Before you begin, make sure your environment meets these requirements.
GS_INSTALLATION_DESC: Add AUM as a git subtree to your NX workspace. This allows you to pull upstream updates while keeping your app code separate.
GS_INSTALLATION_NOTE: After adding the subtree, register all @aum/* path aliases in tsconfig.base.json pointing to the respective libs.
GS_THEME_DESC: Import the AUM theme in your global stylesheet and configure the SCSS preprocessor paths so rem() and mixins are available in every component.
GS_CONFIGURE_DESC: All app-level configuration — navigation, branding, toolbar menus, and user preference defaults — lives in app-config.json. No code changes needed for most customizations.
GS_TEMPLATE_DESC: AUM ships two application shell templates. Pick one and use it as the parent route in app.routes.ts.
GS_TEMPLATE_1_DESC: Toolbar-first layout. Top toolbar always visible; sidenav slides in as an overlay. Best for enterprise apps with heavy navigation.
GS_TEMPLATE_2_DESC: Sidebar-first layout. Persistent sidebar on desktop, collapses to a drawer on mobile. Best for simpler or standalone apps.
GS_I18N_DESC: AUM uses a two-source translation architecture. Library keys live under the AUM.* namespace; your app keys live at root level. Zero collision by design.
GS_I18N_ORDER_NOTE: provideHttpClient() must appear before TranslateModule.forRoot() in your providers list — reversing this order causes translations to fail silently.
GS_CONCEPTS_DESC: Understanding the library's structure helps you navigate and extend it effectively.
GS_CONCEPT_UI: Reusable UI components — buttons, forms, dialogs, layout, navigation
GS_CONCEPT_UTILS: Shared services — AppConfigService, ThemeService, PaletteService, AuthService, and more
GS_CONCEPT_TEMPLATES: Application shell templates — AumTemplate and AumTemplate2
GS_CONCEPT_COMMON: Shared assets, i18n files, LoginComponent, PageNotFoundComponent
GS_CONCEPT_THEME: Material Design 3 theme definitions, SCSS abstracts, rem() function, utility classes
GS_COMPONENTS_DESC: A complete set of production-ready components ready to use in your application.
GS_RESOURCES_DESC: Everything you need to go deeper.
GS_RES_GITHUB_DESC: Browse the source code and contribute
GS_RES_PLAYGROUND_DESC: Live interactive demos of all components
GS_RES_ISSUES_DESC: Found a bug? Open an issue on GitHub
UI_LAB_SUBTITLE: Interactive docs, live examples, and API reference for every AUM component.
UI_LAB_SEARCH_EMPTY: No components found for your search.
UI_LAB_BUTTONS_DESC: Button and Button Toggle — action triggers and segmented controls.
GS_RES_UI_LAB_DESC: Interactive component docs with live examples and API reference
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_TYPES_DESC: Four core variants: filled for primary actions, outlined for secondary, basic for low-emphasis, and icon for compact icon-only controls.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_SIZES_DESC: size='large' (default, 36px) and size='small' (28px). Both use rem() so they scale with Compact / Default / Large density modes.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_ICON_TEXT_DESC: Pass both [icon] and [value] to render a leading icon alongside the label. Works on all text button types in both sizes.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_DISABLED_DESC: All button types support [disabled]='true'. Visual treatment and pointer events are suppressed consistently across variants.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_TOOLTIP_DESC: Pass [tooltip] to show a Material tooltip on hover. Commonly used on icon-only buttons, but available on all types.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BTN_WIDTH_DESC: Set [width] to any valid CSS length to stretch the button — useful for form submit buttons or full-width CTAs.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_SINGLE_DESC: Default mode. One option selected at a time.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_ICON_LABEL_DESC: Each option has an icon alongside the label. Icon scales with the size modifier.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_MULTI_DESC: Multiple options can be active simultaneously. Output is an array of selected values.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_SIZE_DESC: size='small' (28px) and size='large' (36px, default). Both adapt via rem() with density modes.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_ICONS_ONLY_DESC: Empty label with icon — for compact controls like alignment pickers.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BT_DISABLED_DESC: The entire group is disabled. The checked state is still visible but interaction is blocked.
UI_LAB_CAT_BUTTONS_DESC: Button, Button Toggle — action triggers and segmented controls.
UI_LAB_CAT_FORM_CONTROLS_DESC: Input, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Datepicker, Autocomplete.
UI_LAB_CAT_NAVIGATION_DESC: Breadcrumb and Menu List navigation components.
UI_LAB_COMP_BUTTON_DESC: Versatile button with four variants (filled, outlined, basic, icon), two sizes, optional leading icon, tooltip, and custom width.
UI_LAB_COMP_BUTTON_TOGGLE_DESC: Segmented control for single or multi-select options. Supports icon + label, icon-only, two sizes, and disabled state.
UI_LAB_FORM_CONTROLS_DESC: Input, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Date Picker, Autocomplete.
UI_LAB_COMP_INPUT_DESC: Text, email, number, password inputs and textarea with built-in validation.
UI_LAB_COMP_CHECKBOX_DESC: Single checkbox with indeterminate state, label positioning, and disabled support.
UI_LAB_COMP_RADIO_DESC: Radio button group for single selection from a list of options.
UI_LAB_COMP_SELECT_DESC: Single and multiple select dropdowns with reactive form support.
UI_LAB_COMP_DATEPICKER_DESC: Date, date range, month, and year pickers with min/max constraints.
UI_LAB_COMP_AUTOCOMPLETE_DESC: Type-ahead select with filtered dropdown and form control support.
UI_LAB_SCENE_INPUT_TEXT_DESC: Basic text input with label and placeholder.
UI_LAB_SCENE_INPUT_TYPES_DESC: type='email', 'password', and 'number' with appropriate keyboard handling.
UI_LAB_SCENE_INPUT_TEXTAREA_DESC: Set [textarea]='true' for multiline input. Control height with [rows].
UI_LAB_SCENE_INPUT_VALIDATION_DESC: Pass a FormControl via [control] for reactive validation. Errors display automatically below the field.
UI_LAB_SCENE_INPUT_STATES_DESC: [disabled]='true' blocks interaction. [readonly]='true' shows the value without allowing edits.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CB_BASIC_DESC: Bind state via [checked] and react to changes via (checkedChange).
UI_LAB_SCENE_CB_LABEL_POS_DESC: labelPosition='after' (default) puts the label to the right; 'before' places it to the left.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CB_INDETERMINATE_DESC: [indeterminate]='true' shows a dash icon — useful for select-all controls.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CB_DISABLED_DESC: [disabled]='true' prevents interaction while preserving the visible checked state.
UI_LAB_SCENE_RADIO_BASIC_DESC: Pass [options] with label/value pairs. Exactly one option can be selected at a time.
UI_LAB_SCENE_RADIO_LABEL_POS_DESC: labelPosition='after' (default) or 'before'. Applied uniformly to all options in the group.
UI_LAB_SCENE_RADIO_DISABLED_DESC: Mark individual options with disabled: true to prevent selection while leaving others active.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SELECT_SINGLE_DESC: Choose one item from a dropdown. Pass [optionList] with value/text pairs.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SELECT_MULTI_DESC: Set [multiple]='true' to allow selecting several options. Output is an array.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SELECT_DISABLED_DESC: Mark individual options with disabled: true, or set [disabled]='true' on the entire select.
UI_LAB_SCENE_DATE_BASIC_DESC: Single date selection with a calendar popup. Emits via (dateSelected).
UI_LAB_SCENE_DATE_RANGE_DESC: mode='daterange' enables start/end selection. Emits { start, end } via (dateRangeSelected).
UI_LAB_SCENE_DATE_MONTH_DESC: mode='month' and mode='year' restrict the calendar to coarser granularity.
UI_LAB_SCENE_DATE_DISABLED_DESC: [disabled]='true' shows the picker in a non-interactive state.
UI_LAB_SCENE_AUTO_BASIC_DESC: Type to filter the dropdown list. Select an option to set the value.
UI_LAB_SCENE_AUTO_SEARCH_DESC: Use autocomplete for city search — the list filters as you type.
UI_LAB_SCENE_AUTO_DISABLED_DESC: [disabled]='true' blocks input. [readonly]='true' shows the current value without editing.
UI_LAB_LAYOUT_DESC: Card, Tabs, Expansion Panel, Carousel — surface and content layout components.
UI_LAB_COMP_CARD_DESC: Surface container with configurable padding, shadow, and dimensions.
UI_LAB_COMP_TABS_DESC: Tab group for organising content into labelled panels with animated switching.
UI_LAB_COMP_EXPANSION_PANEL_DESC: Accordion with single or multi-open modes, default-expanded and disabled items.
UI_LAB_COMP_CAROUSEL_DESC: Horizontally scrolling image carousel with arrow navigation and click events.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CARD_BASIC_DESC: Default card with padding and box shadow. Drop any content inside.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CARD_NO_PADDING_DESC: Set [padding]='false' for flush content like images or data tables.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CARD_NO_SHADOW_DESC: [boxShadow]='false' removes the elevation — useful for flat, outlined card styles.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CARD_DIMENSIONS_DESC: Set width and height to any valid CSS value to create fixed-size card grids.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_BASIC_DESC: Compose aum-tab children inside aum-tab-group. Each tab renders its content on selection.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_SELECTED_DESC: Use [selectedIndex] and (selectedIndexChange) to control the active tab from code.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_DISABLED_DESC: [disabled]='true' on aum-tab dims the header label and prevents the panel from being selected.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_HEADER_BELOW_DESC: headerPosition='below' moves the tab strip under the content — useful for wizard-style flows.
UI_LAB_SCENE_EP_BASIC_DESC: Default mode: opening a panel collapses the previously open one. Great for FAQs.
UI_LAB_SCENE_EP_MULTI_DESC: [multi]='true' allows multiple panels to stay open at the same time.
UI_LAB_SCENE_EP_EXPANDED_DESC: Set expanded: true on an item to have it open on first render.
UI_LAB_SCENE_EP_DISABLED_DESC: Set disabled: true on individual items to lock them in their current state.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_BASIC_DESC: Pass carouselItems with imgUrl, title, and description. Arrow navigation is enabled by default.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_SIZE_DESC: itemWidth and itemHeight accept any CSS length — override defaults to fit your layout.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_SCROLL_DESC: scrollMode='viewport' advances by the full visible area; 'item' (default) advances one card at a time.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_CLICK_DESC: (cardClick) emits { item, index } on every card click. Use it to open detail views or fire actions.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_CUSTOM_LABEL_DESC: Use <ng-template aum-tab-label> inside any aum-tab to add icons, badges, or any markup to the header strip.
UI_LAB_SCENE_TABS_PRESERVE_DESC: [preserveContent]="true" keeps all tab DOM alive after first render. Scroll the long tab, switch away, and come back — position is maintained.
UI_LAB_SCENE_EP_PROJECTION_DESC: Use <ng-template aumExpansionPanelContent> to project rich content. The template receives the item and its index for conditional rendering.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_NO_ARROWS_DESC: [showArrows]="false" hides the left/right buttons. Users navigate with trackpad, touch, or mouse scroll.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CAR_INFINITE_DESC: [infiniteScroll]="true" enables a continuous auto-scrolling animation. Hover over the carousel to pause. Control speed with [animationDuration] (seconds).
UI_LAB_NAVIGATION_DESC: Breadcrumb and Menu List navigation components.
UI_LAB_COMP_BREADCRUMB_DESC: Reactive navigation trail driven by BreadcrumbService. Call setBreadcrumbs() from any component to update the trail.
UI_LAB_COMP_MENU_LIST_DESC: Flat or nested action menu with icon support, disabled states, and selection tracking.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BC_BASIC_DESC: Inject BreadcrumbService and call setBreadcrumbs() to populate the trail. The component reads from the service automatically.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BC_DYNAMIC_DESC: Call setBreadcrumbs() with a new array at any time to update the trail without reloading.
UI_LAB_SCENE_BC_CLEAR_DESC: Call clear() to remove all breadcrumbs from the trail.
UI_LAB_SCENE_ML_BASIC_DESC: A flat list of items without icons. The last selected item is highlighted.
UI_LAB_SCENE_ML_ICONS_DESC: Set icon on each MenuItem to show a leading Material Symbol alongside the label.
UI_LAB_SCENE_ML_NESTED_DESC: Items with a children array render as nested dropdown submenus.
UI_LAB_SCENE_ML_DISABLED_DESC: Set disabled: true on any MenuItem to prevent it from being selected.
UI_LAB_SCENE_ML_RESULT_DESC: (itemSelected) emits the clicked MenuItem. Bind its label or value to update component state.
UI_LAB_FEEDBACK_DESC: Snackbar notifications, generic dialogs, and confirmation prompts.
UI_LAB_COMP_SNACKBAR_DESC: Toast notifications for success, error, warning, and info with optional action callbacks.
UI_LAB_COMP_GENERIC_DIALOG_DESC: Configurable dialog shell with optional close button, body height, and no-padding mode.
UI_LAB_COMP_CONFIRMATION_DIALOG_DESC: Confirm/cancel prompt with optional illustration, custom button text, and boolean result.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SB_TYPES_DESC: Four notification types: success, error, warning, and info. Each has a distinct icon and color.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SB_ACTION_DESC: Pass an action object with a label and callback. The button appears on the right of the snackbar.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SB_DURATION_DESC: The second argument controls visibility duration in milliseconds. Default is 5000ms.
UI_LAB_SCENE_GD_BASIC_DESC: Open a dialog with MatDialog.open(). Project your content inside <aum-generic-dialog>.
UI_LAB_SCENE_GD_NO_CLOSE_DESC: [showCloseButton]="false" hides the X button. Dismiss programmatically via dialogRef.close().
UI_LAB_SCENE_GD_NO_PADDING_DESC: [noPadding]="true" removes body padding — useful for full-bleed images or custom layouts.
UI_LAB_SCENE_GD_BODY_HEIGHT_DESC: Set [bodyHeight] to a CSS length to constrain and scroll the dialog body.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CD_BASIC_DESC: A simple confirm/cancel dialog with a title and message.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CD_IMAGE_DESC: Pass confirmationImage to show a built-in illustration above the text. Options: alert, check, info, error-page, etc.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CD_CUSTOM_TEXT_DESC: Override confirmText and cancelText to match your action context (e.g., Delete / Keep).
UI_LAB_SCENE_CD_RESULT_DESC: The dialog closes with true (confirmed) or false (cancelled). Subscribe to afterClosed() to react.
UI_LAB_UTILITIES_DESC: Icon display and loading spinner utility components.
UI_LAB_COMP_ICON_DESC: Material Symbol icon with scalable sizing and semantic color preset support.
UI_LAB_COMP_SPINNER_DESC: Loading indicator supporting element and page overlay modes with optional text label.
UI_LAB_SCENE_IC_DEFAULT_DESC: Without [width] or [height], icons render at the default 24×24px scale. Use name to specify any Material Symbol.
UI_LAB_SCENE_IC_SIZE_DESC: Pass [width] in pixels. The component converts to rem and applies --ui-scale for compact/large mode support.
UI_LAB_SCENE_IC_COLOR_DESC: Use [color] with a preset token (primary, secondary, error, on-surface…) or any raw CSS color string.
UI_LAB_SCENE_IC_INLINE_DESC: Icons display inline and inherit the surrounding text color via currentColor when no [color] is set.
UI_LAB_SCENE_IC_DYNAMIC_DESC: Bind [name] to a signal or variable to swap icons at runtime without re-rendering the parent.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SP_BASIC_DESC: Default mode is element (inline) and type is indeterminate. Renders a continuous rotation animation.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SP_DETERMINATE_DESC: type="determinate" fills the arc based on [progress] (0–100). Ideal for upload or load progress feedback.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SP_TEXT_DESC: Set [text] to show a label alongside the spinner. Use [textPosition] to control placement: top, bottom, left, or right.
UI_LAB_SCENE_SP_SIZES_DESC: Set [diameter] in pixels. Common sizes range from 24 (compact) to 80 (prominent loading indicator).
UI_LAB_COMP_CHART_DESC: Chart.js wrapper supporting bar, line, doughnut, pie, radar, and more chart types.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CH_BAR_DESC: A vertical bar chart. Pass type: 'bar' with labels and a datasets array.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CH_LINE_DESC: Multi-dataset line chart. Use tension for smooth curves and fill for area charts.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CH_DOUGHNUT_DESC: Circular chart split into segments. Pass data as a flat array aligned with the labels.
UI_LAB_SCENE_CH_SIZE_DESC: Set width and height in the config to fix the chart dimensions. Use responsive: false to prevent auto-scaling.
